blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt arrive at San Siro 90 minutes from Norwegian football history
Arsenal lead City by 5 points after dismantling Spurs 4-1 — the title race looks increasingly one-sided. Barcelona's 3-0 cruise keeps them in La Liga contention heading into spring.
🎿 Thu 16:05 — Biathlon World Cup Kontiolahti opens, JT Bø and Røiseland headline Norway
